title: TL Entry
description: Trusted List entry for LoTL - one file per participant per TL type

tl_url.description: URL of the TL (JSON or XML; at least one format)

tl_url_xml.description: URL of the TL in XML format (if different from tl_url)

tl_url_json.description: URL of the TL in JSON format (if different from tl_url)

trust_anchor.description: X.509 certificate in PEM format - used to validate the TL signature

metadata.description: Additional metadata per TL type (e.g. operator name, country)
